panels.description: Current GNO price in USD from CoinGecko. Used to derive CRC price.
panels.title: GNO Price (USD)

panels.description: CRC price in USD, derived from GNO offer price. Formula: (1 / tokenPriceInCrc) * GNO_USD
panels.title: CRC Price (USD)

panels.description: CRC value in GNO terms (from token offer exchange rate).
panels.title: CRC/GNO Rate

panels.description: Total CRC supply valued in USD. This represents the total market cap of Circles.
panels.title: Total Supply (USD)

panels.description: CRC minted in the last 24h, valued in USD. Represents new value entering the economy.
panels.title: Daily Mint (USD)

panels.description: CRC transferred in the last 24h, valued in USD. Represents economic activity.
panels.title: Daily Volume (USD)

panels.description: Historical CRC price in USD and GNO over time.
panels.title: Price History

panels.description: Total CRC supply valued in USD over time - the 'market cap' of Circles.
panels.title: Ecosystem Value Over Time

panels.description: Price data source indicator. Shows which pricing method is active.
panels.title: Price Source Status

panels.description: Daily economic activity in USD terms.
panels.title: Daily Economic Activity (USD)
Total CRC Supply
panels.description: Current total CRC in circulation. This is the sum of all demurraged balances across all accounts. Lower than 'Total Minted' because CRC continuously loses value through demurrage (~7% annually).

panels.title: Total Minted (All Time)
panels.description: Total CRC ever minted since genesis (before demurrage). This number only goes up. The difference between this and 'Total Supply' represents CRC lost to demurrage over time.

panels.title: Active Balance Holders
panels.description: Number of unique accounts with non-zero CRC balance. 'Active' means the account holds at least some CRC after demurrage. Counted from V_CrcV2_BalancesByAccountAndToken where demurragedTotalBalance > 0.

panels.title: Gini Coefficient
panels.description: Wealth inequality measure (0=equal, 1=unequal). INCLUDES: All registered Circles accounts - humans, groups, and organizations with any CRC balance. EXCLUDES: Zero-balance accounts, non-registered addresses. For human-only analysis, see 'Gini (Humans Only)' below.

panels.title: Top 10 Concentration
panels.description: % of total CRC held by top 10 accounts. INCLUDES: All account types (humans, groups, organizations, pools). WARNING: May be dominated by liquidity pools or group treasuries. For human-only concentration, see breakdown by account type.

panels.title: Top 100 Concentration
panels.description: % of total CRC held by top 100 accounts. INCLUDES: All account types. Higher values indicate wealth concentration; lower values indicate broader distribution.

panels.title: Top 1000 Concentration
panels.description: % of total CRC held by top 1000 accounts. INCLUDES: All account types. If close to 100%, indicates most value is held by a small portion of accounts.

panels.title: Gini Coefficient Over Time
panels.description: Lower is better - indicates more equal wealth distribution
Number of human accounts with non-zero CRC balance. Provides context for other wealth distribution metrics.
panels.title: Holders

panels.description: Wealth inequality among human accounts (0=perfect equality, 1=perfect inequality). This is the key 'fair money' indicator for the Circles economy.
panels.title: Gini

panels.description: Percentage of total CRC supply held by human accounts.
panels.title: Supply Share

panels.description: % of human-held CRC owned by top 10 human accounts.
panels.title: Top 10

panels.description: % of human-held CRC owned by top 100 human accounts.
panels.title: Top 100

panels.description: % of human-held CRC owned by top 1000 human accounts.
panels.title: Top 1000

panels.description: Gini for humans EXCLUDING custodians/aggregators (accounts with >50 unique tokens). Filters out exchanges and protocol treasuries for a purer measure.
panels.title: Gini (Non-Cust)

panels.description: Top 10 concentration among non-custodial humans only.
panels.title: Top 10 (NC)

panels.description: Top 100 concentration among non-custodial humans.
panels.title: Top 100 (NC)

panels.description: Top 1000 concentration among non-custodial humans.
panels.title: Top 1000 (NC)

panels.description: Historical Gini coefficient for human accounts over time.
panels.title: Human Gini Over Time

panels.description: Historical concentration metrics for human accounts.
panels.title: Human Concentration Over Time

panels.description: Number of organization accounts with non-zero CRC balance.
panels.title: Holders

panels.description: Wealth inequality among organization accounts.
panels.title: Gini

panels.description: Percentage of total CRC supply held by organizations.
panels.title: Supply Share

panels.description: % of org-held CRC owned by top 10 organizations.
panels.title: Top 10

panels.description: % of org-held CRC owned by top 100 organizations.
panels.title: Top 100

panels.description: % of org-held CRC owned by top 1000 organizations.
panels.title: Top 1000

panels.description: Number of group accounts. NOTE: Groups are token ISSUERS - they mint their own community currency rather than accumulating CRC. These metrics are informational only.
panels.title: Groups with CRC

panels.description: Gini among groups that hold CRC. High values are expected since groups rarely hold CRC - they issue their own tokens instead.
panels.title: Gini (Groups)

panels.description: % of total CRC held by groups. Expected to be near 0% since groups issue their own tokens.
panels.title: Supply Share

panels.description: Distribution of CRC holdings across account types.
panels.title: CRC Supply Share by Type

panels.description: Historical supply share by account type.
panels.title: Supply Share Over Time

panels.description: Gini coefficient comparison across all account types over time.
panels.title: Gini by Account Type Over Time

panels.description: Number of accounts with non-zero CRC balance by type over time.
panels.title: Balance Holder Count by Type
Money Velocity (7d)
panels.description: Transfer volume / Total supply - how many times CRC changed hands

panels.title: Money Velocity Over Time
panels.description: Higher velocity = CRC is being used actively in transactions

panels.title: DAW/MAW Stickiness
panels.description: Higher = more consistent daily engagement

panels.title: User Retention Rate
panels.description: % of users active in previous period who returned

panels.title: First-Time Transactors
panels.description: Users who made their first transfer in the period

panels.title: CRC Holdings: Economic Actors vs Infrastructure
panels.description: Breakdown of total CRC holdings between economic actors (humans, groups, organizations) and infrastructure addresses (Balancer vaults, group treasury vaults). Infrastructure tokens are held for liquidity and collateral, not economic activity.

panels.title: Economic Actors %
panels.description: Percentage of total CRC held by economic actors (humans, groups, orgs)

panels.title: Infrastructure %
panels.description: Percentage of total CRC held by infrastructure (Balancer vaults, group treasuries)

panels.title: Holdings Over Time: Economic vs Infrastructure
panels.description: Time series of CRC holdings breakdown between economic actors and infrastructure addresses
